scripts.dev: npm run build -w @agentzcash/core && concurrently -k -n DASH,MCP -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @agentzcash/dashboard" "npm run dev -w @agentzcash/mcp-server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentzcash/core && npm run build -w agentzcash && npm run build -w @agentzcash/mcp-server && npm run build -w @agentzcash/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/cli apps/mcp-server --pretty false && tsc -p apps/dashboard/tsconfig.json --pretty false
